description: Add a composite settings drawer in the popup, share backup/import-export logic with options, and sync popup state live from extension storage.

userStories.title: Extract shared backup and settings snapshot helpers
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want options and popup to reuse one backup/import/export implementation so storage, IndexedDB, resume serialization, and AI config normalization stay consistent.
acceptanceCriteria: Create a shared module for backup snapshot read, import payload normalization, snapshot apply, resume image serialization/deserialization, AI config normalization, and import preview helpers
Options page uses the shared module instead of duplicating backup/import/export logic inline
Shared snapshot application keeps chrome.storage.local and IndexedDB resume images in sync
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Shared backup/import-export helpers live in src/shared/settings-backup.js and options now consumes them.

userStories.title: Add popup composite settings drawer
userStories.description: As a user, I want a dedicated composite settings entry in the popup header so I can manage AI API settings, text resume, and full backup import/export without leaving the side panel flow.
acceptanceCriteria: Popup header adds a composite settings button alongside the existing AI and gear buttons without breaking narrow layout
Composite settings drawer includes AI API configuration, text resume editing, and full backup import/export preview-confirm UI
Popup AI settings save and test flows still work and the legacy AI button remains available as a smaller-scope entry point
Popup uses the shared backup/import/export module for save, export, import preview, confirm import, and cancel import
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Sync popup state live from extension storage
userStories.description: As a user, I want popup settings, filters, and resume images to refresh immediately after save or import so I do not need to close and reopen the side panel.
acceptanceCriteria: Popup listens to chrome.storage.onChanged for resumeImages, ui:filterState, sw:aiConfig, apiKey, and textResume
resumeImages refresh clears popup Store resumeImages before rebuilding thumbnails so images never duplicate after sync
ui:filterState refresh fully overwrites popup filter-related Store fields and rerenders cities, positions, industries, chips, and send-greeting toggle
sw:aiConfig, apiKey, and textResume refresh update popup AI/composite settings forms and AI button configured state
Importing a valid snapshot updates popup home filters, resume images, and settings drawer content immediately
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using available Codex browser tooling
